name: Enabled User Right in AD to Control User Objects
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @neu5ron
SIGMA Title: Enabled User Right in AD to Control User Objects
SIGMA Description: Detects scenario where if a user is assigned the SeEnableDelegationPrivilege right in Active Directory it would allow control of other AD user objects.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4704 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seenabledelegationprivilege%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Enabled User Right in AD to Control User Objects on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4704 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seenabledelegationprivilege%' AQL filter query
